title: Heavier-mission boot-load non-determinism bounds deterministic-tape route coverage to missions 1-5
repro: Record an intro-disable or self-contained traversal tape on a heavier mission (silo/archives/depot/egypt) or a boss (cradle/aztec) under the determinism envelope; replay via tools/fidelity/gate_routes_smoke.sh. Boss levels: tape length + record-path hash vary run-to-run. Heavier levels: intermittent 'tick misalignment at record 4 (expected rel 5, got 2)' boot-load race.

history.note: Found while authoring the Phase B archetype route subset (FID-0031/D4). 6 gate:true routes landed on the reliably race-free early missions (Dam x2 + facility/runway/surface1/bunker1). Boss archetype (cradle/aztec) dropped for Mode-A non-determinism; heavier levels blocked by Mode-B boot-load tick race. FID-0046-adjacent.
